text.title: A/B Testing Implementation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the ab-testing-implementation methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: model-events
step.action: Write ExperimentEvent dataclass + Pydantic model. Pin schema in tests.

step.name: build-tracker
step.action: ExperimentTracker.expose() dedups by (experiment_id, request_id). track_conversion() emits typed conversion event.

step.name: implement-analyzer
step.action: Implement two-proportion z-test + Wilson CIs. Surface lift_abs + lift_rel + CI + p_value.
step.output: analyzer.py with tests against known fixtures

step.name: reporter
step.action: Generate per-variant rows + guardrails. Auto-flag guardrail regressions ≥10%.

step.name: validate-end-to-end
step.action: Run analyzer on known data; assert p_value, lift_abs, CI within tolerance.
step.decision-gate: Reject ship if any guardrail regressed.
